title: hamamelis japonica subsp. megalophylla
intro: Hamamelis japonica subsp. megalophylla, also known as Japanese witch hazel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the witch hazel family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Hamamelis japonica subsp. megalophylla include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to support skin health and address various health concerns.
